subject: Issue with recent shipment
body: Hello, I hope you're having a nice day. I wanted to let you know that the entire shipment for our office (ORD-88123) arrived today and unfortunately every single item was destroyed. The boxes were completely crushed and waterlogged. This was a bulk order of $52,000 worth of industrial equipment for our manufacturing line. Production is currently halted because we were depending on these parts. No rush on your end though — just whenever you get a chance to look into it would be great. Thank you so much for your time and I appreciate your help!

expected.notes: Calm, polite language masking catastrophic $52K loss with production halted. Tests whether Scorer correctly identifies high risk despite low emotional intensity.
